QC5a_TLS_mechanism.definition: Complete acoustic/phononic bandgap suppresses phonon-mediated TLS/defect relaxation by >2-5x and can reach ms-scale T1.

evidence_ladder.description: Like-for-like public proxy is robust under controls/subsampling.

QC5a_TLS_mechanism.label: QC5a_TLS_mechanism

QC5b_transmon_T1.definition: Standalone transmon-qubit T1 > 1 ms with transition inside a complete acoustic bandgap and >2-5x over controls.

evidence_ladder.description: Downloaded literature gives context/phrases only; no numeric proxy table.

QC5b_transmon_T1.label: QC5b_transmon_T1

evidence_ladder.description: Numeric proxy exists, but it is not the target observable or is too small/low-quality.

decision.interpretation: QC5a is supported when public text contains the embedded-TLS bandgap result (>5 ms and >100x). QC5b, the original standalone-transmon T1 >1 ms target, remains unconfirmed until a public on/off-bandgap transmon experiment reports that metric.

downloaded_sources.label: Odeh Sipahigil 2023 non-Markovian qubit phononic bandgap arXiv
Place Houck 2020 transmon 0.3 ms benchmark arXiv

extracted_claims.evidence: abstract reports two-orders relaxation-time increase and longest T1 exceeding 5 ms for embedded TLS inside acoustic bandgap
extracted_claims.measurement_target: embedded TLS strongly coupled to a transmon circuit, not transmon T1 itself

extracted_claims.evidence: abstract reports non-Markovian qubit dynamics due to Purcell-engineered TLS lifetime of 34 us inside phononic bandgap
extracted_claims.measurement_target: engineered TLS lifetime / qubit non-Markovian dynamics, not standalone transmon T1

extracted_claims.evidence: abstract reports transmon lifetimes/coherence exceeding 0.3 ms from tantalum material platform, not phononic bandgap
theory/model source for phononic bandgap suppression of phonon-mediated decay

falsification_logic.confirm_like: A public experiment reports transmon-qubit T1 >1 ms with the transition inside a complete acoustic bandgap and >2-5x over off-gap/control devices.
falsification_logic.current_status_rule: QC5a/TLS enhancement can be mechanism-supported; QC5b/original transmon T1 target requires standalone qubit T1 rows.
falsification_logic.falsify_like: Comparable on/off-bandgap transmon devices repeatedly show <2x improvement or no trend once non-phononic channels are controlled.

prediction: QC5 split: QC5a phononic-bandgap TLS/mechanism support; QC5b standalone transmon-qubit T1 >1 ms and >2-5x inside a complete bandgap near 4-8 GHz.
test_name: QC5 phononic-crystal substrate T1 public benchmark
